idea: Persistent A-stationary kernel: 114 CTAs, atomic tile counter, row-major tile scheduling (A-reuse). Per-tile barrier reinit via init(). Result: 98 TFLOPS — major regression due to (1) serial tile processing with __syncthreads() overhead, (2) cp_async_bulk_wait_group per tile serializing output TMA, (3) atomic tile counter contention. Tensor active dropped to 20% vs iter005 56%.
